design_philosophy: A sophisticated, high-end editorial experience mirroring luxury fashion or premium architecture. Avoid typical BBQ or crunchy-eco tropes. Use stark monochrome contrast (deep charcoal vs stark white) with generous negative space, cinematic photography, and elegant typography to elevate the 'Plus Value' grading.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight leading-tight

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more padding than standard SaaS. Containers must breathe.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Use bento grids with aggressive asymmetry. Base grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 md:gap-12.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align large blocks of text. Center-align only brief, dramatic statements.

buttons.primary: rounded-none bg-primary text-primary-foreground px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-sm hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: rounded-none border border-primary bg-transparent text-primary px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-sm hover:bg-primary hover:text-primary-foreground transition-all duration-300

cards.style: rounded-none border border-border bg-background p-8 md:p-12 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-500
cards.shadow: No shadows. Rely on 1px solid borders for definition.

navigation.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70 border-b border-border/40
navigation.links: text-sm uppercase tracking-widest font-medium hover:opacity-50 transition-opacity

whatsapp_cta.style: fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-50 rounded-full bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 shadow-2xl hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300 flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer
whatsapp_cta.icon: lucide-react MessageCircle or standard Whatsapp icon

forms.inputs: rounded-none border-b border-border bg-transparent px-0 py-3 text-lg focus:ring-0 focus:border-primary transition-colors outline-none

motion.scrolling: MANDATORY: Implement lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
motion.page_load: Fade up with Framer Motion (y: 20 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1, duration: 0.8, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1]).
motion.scroll_reveals: Staggered fade-up for grid items. Use intersection observer.

home.hero: Full-height (min-h-screen). Background: hero_charcoal_cube. Dark overlay (bg-black/30). Huge H1 'The first eco-friendly graded charcoal'.
home.showcase: Asymmetric split layout. Left side sticky text, right side scrolling high-res images of the 'Plus Value' charcoal.

about.hero: Minimalist header, transitioning into the about_bg architectural scene.
about.story: Editorial layout. Large drop caps, massive pull quotes in Cormorant Garamond. Focus on Indonesian heritage, sustainable forestry, and meticulous grading process.

contact.layout: Split screen. Left: Abstract charcoal background with contact details. Right: Minimalist, stark white form section submitting to info@javaheat.com.

hero_charcoal_cube.description: Cinematic macro shot of a geometric charcoal cube. Perfect for Hero background.

about_bg.description: Minimalist dark teak wood architecture scene for the About page transition.

abstract_charcoal_bg.description: Soft abstract charcoal gradient for the contact page left panel.

glowing_embers.description: Close-up of glowing red hot coals in a dark fire pit. Good for accent/feature sections.

dark_texture.description: Dark charcoal/paper texture for subtle card backgrounds or footers.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements, forms, and navigation links MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use react-router-dom for routing between Home, About Us, and Contact.
Implement Shadcn UI for standard components but override classes to match the rounded-none, border-heavy aesthetic.
The Contact form must simulate submission to info@javaheat.com and a mock MongoDB endpoint.
Install and configure 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' from Google Fonts in index.html.
For the floating WhatsApp CTA, place it globally in the root layout.
